title: Extend command_bead_list() with --status, --agent, and --feature-root filters
description: Extend command_bead_list() in src/agent_takt/cli/commands/bead.py to apply three new filters from parsed args after loading all beads: (1) --status list — keep beads whose status is in the set, OR semantics across multiple values; (2) --agent list — keep beads whose agent_type is in the set, OR semantics; (3) --feature-root single value — resolve via resolve_bead_id, then keep beads whose feature_root_id matches the resolved ID. All three filters combine AND-wise with each other and with the existing --label filter. When no new flags are passed the full bead list is returned unchanged, preserving the existing sort order and JSON/plain output paths.
acceptance_criteria: takt bead list --status in_progress returns only beads with status==in_progress
takt bead list --status ready --status blocked returns beads in either status (OR)
takt bead list --agent tester --status ready returns only beads that are both tester AND ready (AND)
takt bead list --feature-root <id> returns only beads with matching feature_root_id
takt bead list --label X still works unchanged when no new flags are passed
takt bead list with no filters returns the same output as before this change
Partial --feature-root prefix resolves correctly via resolve_bead_id
